contract.goal: Reshape /loom-archive's interview body to grill-me pace: corpus-first, then AskUserQuestion for each retro dimension with model-drafted recommendation + 4 discrete options. Match /draft-plan's established pattern. Skill responsibilities + downstream §4-7 unchanged. D2 of 3 in Phase 3.
acceptance_criteria: New §3 grill-me interview: one dimension at a time, model drafts from corpus, AskUserQuestion with 4 options (Looks right / Yes and add more / Replace with mine / Skip), recommended first.
Rules section gains grill-me pace entry, replaces 'Interview is short' rule.
rules_applied: Mirror /draft-plan's grill-me pattern (recommended answer first, AskUserQuestion for discrete options, one question at a time).
Body-only edits; no behavioral test impact.
Preserve four PLAN.md categories (kept-well, improvement, process-change, follow-up).
disqualifiers: Edit downstream §4-7 (compose retro, write retro, archive, report).
Add categories beyond the four named ones.

actions: Read /loom-archive and /draft-plan to understand the current shape + reference pattern.
Swapped §2 (Interview) and §3 (Read corpus) — corpus-first per grill-me pattern (model needs context before asking).

Rewrote §3 (Grill-me interview) with: dimension-by-dimension flow; model drafts recommendation from corpus; AskUserQuestion with 4 options; one question at a time. Four dimensions covered in PLAN.md order (kept-well, improvement, process-change, follow-up).
Updated Rules section: replaced 'Interview is short' rule with grill-me pace description (corpus-first, AskUserQuestion, recommended-first).
§4-7 untouched (compose retro, write retro, archive, report).
Ran npm test: 470/470 pass. Ran npm run lint: clean.

notes_for_pr: D2 of 3 in Phase 3. D3 is phase close (PR compose + completed).

Orchestration is unchanged: pre-flight → read corpus → interview → compose retro → write retro → archive → report. The §2/§3 swap is a pacing fix (model needs corpus to draft recommendations) not a workflow change.

Contract-fit observation (not blocking): the dimension prose '"at least 2 by the end of this dimension and the next"' for kept-well + improvement could be clearer. Worth a follow-up prose tightening but the substance is correct.
